sidebar.emptyDescNew: Use the + on the left bar to light your first one.
sidebar.emptyDescChoose: Tap an icon on the left to open its channels.

more.title: More options
more.wishingHint: Suggest what to change in Astra

account.title: Account
account.description: Your Astra sign-in credentials. Avatar, banner and bio live in Profile.
account.displayNameHint: How others see you in chat.
account.emailHint: Used for login. Never shown publicly.
account.passwordHintHas: Change it periodically. Min. 8 characters, 1 uppercase and 1 number.
account.passwordHintNone: Your account uses Google sign-in — no local password.
account.appLockHint: Asks for your biometrics when opening the app. This device only.
account.logoutSessionHint: Revokes this token. Other sessions on other devices stay active.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: The identity other members see. Visual styling is in Customization.
profile.formatError: Unsupported format. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF.
profile.pronounsHint: E.g. she/her, he/him, they/them. Shows as a chip on your card.
profile.statusHint: Emoji + short phrase your friends see. Clears when you change or delete it.
profile.customStatusPlaceholder: E.g. Reading a book · Compiling · BRB
profile.bioHint: Up to 300 characters. Markdown: **bold** · *italic* · `code` · [text](url) · line break.

customization.title: Customization
customization.description: Your profile's visual look — banner, theme, font, text color. All auto-saved.
customization.bannerHint: Large image at the top of your profile. Tune background, position and border in separate tabs.
customization.adjustHelp: Drag the image vertically to choose which part shows. Zoom slider: 50% shows the whole banner (bg fills around it) · 200% is max close-up.
customization.adjustLocked: Upload an image in the Background tab to unlock position and zoom adjustment.
customization.themeHint: Background gradient of the card shown when someone opens your profile.
customization.fontHint: Typeface for your name on the profile card and in chat messages. 8 curated families.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the interface colors. Changes show up instantly.
appearance.quickThemeHint: Pre-thought color + background combos. You can still adjust each individually below.
appearance.accentHint: Used on buttons, links, hover and active elements.
appearance.backgroundHint: Base tone of the app. Affects every screen.
appearance.fontSizeHint: Scales the WHOLE UI (rem-based). Handy for large/small screens.
appearance.messageSpacingHint: Compact = more messages visible; Spacious = more breathing room.
appearance.reduceMotionHint: Lessens or removes UI motion. Handy on modest machines or for vestibular sensitivity.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose how the app speaks to you. We're translating Astra screen by screen — more languages are on the way.
